_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of simvastatin on cognitive functioning in children with neurofibromatosis type 1: a randomized controlled trial.

_contextSnippet: Subsequent subgroup analysis showed a significant effect of simvastatin in the group with the baseline object assembly test scores −1 SD or less (β = 0.80 [95% CI, 0.29 to 1.30]; n=37), but not in the group with the baseline object assembly test score of greater than −1 SD
details: Object assembly subtest showed significant effect of simvastatin in children with baseline scores ≤-1 SD (β = 0.80, 95% CI 0.29-1.30, n=37) but not in those with scores >-1 SD
